prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to the teachers' pension scheme and related funding in England specifically, and does not outline provisions that apply to Scotland or other nations in the UK. Education policies and financial assistance are typically a devolved matter, with Scotland managing its own education system.
